message:
data: add e2e test run logs (smoke, writeback, ext4 rw)

Capture 14 e2e harness runs covering ffs_smoke, ffs_writeback_e2e, and
ffs_ext4_rw_smoke test suites from Feb 12-13. These logs serve as
evidence that the mount/read/write paths pass end-to-end and provide
debugging context for any future regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
